## 📝 Description
What does this PR do? Link any issues it closes (e.g. `Closes #123`).

## 🔧 Type of change
- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix
- [ ] ✨ New feature
- [ ] 🤖 New agent / data source
- [ ] 🔌 EHR adapter
- [ ] 📚 Documentation
- [ ] ⚡ Performance
- [ ] ♻️ Refactor

## ✅ Checklist
- [ ] Conventional Commit messages (`feat:`, `fix:`, `docs:`…)
- [ ] `npx tsc --noEmit` passes (frontend changes)
- [ ] Backend imports cleanly (backend changes)
- [ ] `docker compose config --quiet` passes (compose changes)
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior changed

## 🩺 Clinical safety
- [ ] **No real PHI/PII** anywhere in this diff (synthetic data only)
- [ ] Disclaimers & PHI masking preserved
- [ ] New citations/guidelines resolve to **real URLs**
- [ ] Dosing/interaction/prescription changes cite their source

## 🧪 How was this tested?
Describe the tests you ran (with synthetic data) and the results.

Before / after (no PHI).
